rationale: In the citing paper, Kishore et al. (2013) appears only in a grouped citation list as one example documenting sales pull-in/push-out behavior in prior empirical work. The paper does not discuss this study's bonus-versus-commission findings, does not build a specific assumption or proposition from it, and does not return to it in analysis or interpretation. Its role is broad contextual support for a known phenomenon rather than a distinct input to the citing paper's core theoretical development.
